name: CULP INC
summary: As used in this document, the terms Culp, the company, we, our, and us refer to Culp, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries (unless the context indicates another meaning). The term common stock means the common stock of Culp, Inc., par value $.05 per share. The terms Read Window Products and Read refer to our wholly-owned subsidiary, Read Window Products, LLC.
